reason: Confirms the AppStrings convention (single-file _(en, zh) helper) and the centralized-theme rule the FittedBox-wrapped Text must respect (no inline fontSize overrides).
flutter build web is the truth signal; analyze skipped on CJK path.
_items moving from static const to a per-build local helper interacts with how repo_shell.dart reads context-scoped strings; verify no notifier semantics are broken.
